summary: Tooling-only PR that updates `tools/wiki_tu.py` to replace hard-coded wiki table column numbers with a `ColumnIndex` IntEnum and uses those named indices when reading file, Discord, and GitHub assignee columns.

key_files.role: Updated wiki translation-unit parsing to use named column indices instead of raw numeric indices.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: imports IntEnum/auto and adds ColumnIndex enum
raw_diff: read_tr replaces td[5], td[6], and td[0] with ColumnIndex.DISCORD, ColumnIndex.GITHUB, and ColumnIndex.FILE

what_changed.text: Added `from enum import IntEnum, auto` to `tools/wiki_tu.py`.
Changed `read_tr` to use `ColumnIndex.DISCORD` and `ColumnIndex.GITHUB` for bounds checks and value extraction, and `ColumnIndex.FILE` for the assignees dictionary key.

smart_moves.text: Named the full table layout rather than only the currently-read assignee columns, making the parser less dependent on unexplained numeric positions.

decomp_lessons.text: For repository tooling that parses structured external tables, prefer named column constants or enums over raw numeric indices so column-layout fixes are localized and reviewable.
scope: tooling scripts that parse wiki tables
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix columns indices in `wiki_tu.py`
raw_diff: `ColumnIndex` enum introduced and raw indices replaced

naming_conventions.text: The PR uses an enum named `ColumnIndex` with uppercase members matching table roles: `FILE`, `MATCHED`, `TOTAL`, `REMAINING`, `TEXT_PERCENT`, `DATA_PERCENT`, `DISCORD`, and `GITHUB`.

notes: Evidence is strong for the exact file changes because the full diff is loaded.
There is no PR body, review discussion, issue comment, test output, or validation log in the slice, so intent beyond the title and diff should not be inferred.
No assembly, objdiff, or decomp source matching tactics are involved in the provided evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use named indices for wiki table parser columns
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a tooling script parses fixed-position wiki table columns, replace unexplained raw column numbers with named indices or an enum that documents the table layout.
evidence_refs: PR title: Fix columns indices in `wiki_tu.py`
raw_diff: added `ColumnIndex(IntEnum)` and replaced numeric uses in `read_tr`

rejection_notes: Do not infer that this PR changed decomp source, matching status, wiki content, or validation results; the slice only shows a tooling script diff.
Do not promote the specific wiki table layout as a global standard without corroborating current tool or wiki documentation.
